ccache /usr/bin/c++  -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wall -Wextra -flto-odr-type-merging -Walloc-zero -Wcast-qual -Wconversion -Wdeprecated -Wduplicated-branches -Wduplicated-cond -Wimplicit-fallthrough=2 -Wlogical-op -Wno-psabi -Wno-sign-conversion -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-unused-parameter -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wodr -Wpointer-arith -Wsign-compare -Wvla -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -Wno-redundant-move -Wno-stringop-overflow -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--exclude-libs,ALL -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/generate_mtproto.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/generate_mtproto.dir/generate_mtproto.cpp.o -o generate_mtproto  ../../tdtl/libtdtl.a libtl_writer_cpp.a ../../tdtl/libtdtl.a
